title: Heavy Duty Plastic Flexi Tub Home Garden Flexible Storage Bucket Laundry Toys Kitchen Bucket, Rubble Container, 2-Handled Recycled Tub (9L- Taupe Flexi Tube Square)
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND STURDY: Ideal for use in your home and garden due to its lightweight and strong durability. Whether you need it for storing weeds and garden waste, or simply to carry you’re washing outside. This Flexi tub is a great product to have at hand.
EASY TO USE: This 15L heavy-duty plastic Flexi tub comes complete with molded handles for versatility and to allow easy lifting and transport. Each Flexi tub has a measuring scale inside as well.

MULTI-PURPOSE: This is a multi-purpose flexible tub that comes with two integrated carrying handles. It can also be carried like a carrier bag with both handles in 1 hand. This is a multipurpose flexible tub with 2 integrated carrying handles.

PREMIUM QUALITY: This Flexi tub is manufactured from High-Density Flexible Plastic which is very easy to clean and is UV Protected (Prevents Rotting in Sunlight). This is made from 100% Food grade plastic. Easy to lift with two integrated handles and will easily stack together for compact storage.

description: Product Description Tough, flexible, multi-use tub. Reusable and easy to clean. Flexible plastic handles for grip and ease of carriage. Ideal for builders, gardeners, toy storage and many other uses. This flexible (flexi) tub with super strong comfortable handles is lightweight, flexible and tough. It is ideal for use on building sites, farms, stables and around the home and garden. The super tough material makes these perfect for carrying, storage, mixing cement and plaster, pouring and storing liquids, so versatile the list is endless. This Flexi tub is manufactured from High-Density Flexible Plastic which is very easy to clean and is UV Protected (Prevents Rotting in Sunlight).
